text_original: Then, our goal was to keep alive.
text_normalized: Then, our goal was to keep alive.

text_original: Now our goal is to behave righteously/’ Now when hunger-stricken he was not scrupulous about the means of keeping alive, and when satiated he acted hypocritically to appear refined.
text_normalized: Now our goal is to behave righteously/’ Now when hunger-stricken he was not scrupulous about the means of keeping alive, and when satiated he acted hypocritically to appear refined.

text_original: What foolery, perversion, villainy, and pretension can be greater than this!
text_normalized: What foolery, perversion, villainy, and pretension can be greater than this!

text_original: K’ung Mo was lounging with his disciples.
text_normalized: K’ung Mo was lounging with his disciples.

text_original: He remarked: His followers and disciples all imitated him; Tse Kung and Chi Lu assisted K’ung Li and committed high treason against the state of Wei.
text_normalized: He remarked: His followers and disciples all imitated him; Tse Kung and Chi Lu assisted K’ung Li and committed high treason against the state of Wei.

text_original: Yang Huo rebelled against Ch’i.
text_normalized: Yang Huo rebelled against Ch’i.

text_original: Fei Kan was entrusted with Chung Mou and became independent.
text_normalized: Fei Kan was entrusted with Chung Mou and became independent.

text_original: Ch’iTiao had a ferocious appearance.
text_normalized: Ch’iTiao had a ferocious appearance.

text_original: Nothing can be more... than this!
text_normalized: Nothing can be more... than this!

text_original: Of course the disciples and pupils, following a teacher, will advocate his doctrines and imitate his conduct.
text_normalized: Of course the disciples and pupils, following a teacher, will advocate his doctrines and imitate his conduct.

text_original: Only, they are not as powerful and not as clever.
text_normalized: Only, they are not as powerful and not as clever.

text_original: Now, since such was the conduct of K’lmg Mo, the Confucian scholars are naturally to be objects of suspicion.
text_normalized: Now, since such was the conduct of K’lmg Mo, the Confucian scholars are naturally to be objects of suspicion.
